case_title: SALCEDO AMALIA VS PAN AMERICANA TRAVEL TRAVEL SYSTEM et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAN AMERICANA TRAVEL TRAVEL SYSTEM ANGELES ROSA MARIA, SALES MANAGER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALCEDO AMALIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAN AMERICANA TRAVEL TRAVEL SYSTEM ANGELES ROSA MARIA, SALES MANAGER PARTIES AGREED TO CONTACT AIRLINE AND HAVE IT SEND PLTF'S CLOTHES TOHER, NO CHARGE AND ATTEMPT TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO J CABATIC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SALCEDO AMALIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAN AMERICANA TRAVEL TRAVEL SYSTEM ANGELES ROSA MARIA, SALES MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CORRECTION NOTICE RETURNED AND JUDGMENT MAILED
